customPolicies.name: worker-jira
customPolicies.content:
preset:
  name: worker-jira
  description: "worker IT escalation → governed Jira egress (修不了/需人審→開單,受 policy:jira 治理)"
network_policies:
  jira:
    name: jira
    endpoints:
      # 真實 Jira host — boot-stack 從 .env 的 JIRA_URL 渲染 __JIRA_HOST__。HTTPS via L7 proxy,驗證憑證。
      - host: __JIRA_HOST__
        port: 443
        access: full
        tls: verify
    binaries:
      - { path: /usr/bin/curl }
      - { path: /usr/bin/python3* }

customPolicies.name: worker-bridge
customPolicies.content:
# 模板:172.18.0.2 與 172.18.0.2/32 是占位,boot-stack ensure_xagent 會以
# docker inspect 取得 worker-a 當前 IP 渲染成 <IP> 與 <IP>/32 再 policy-add。
preset:
  name: worker-bridge
  description: "Hermes -> worker inbound fix endpoint (scoped; the ONLY cross-agent channel)"
network_policies:
  worker_bridge:
    name: worker_bridge
    endpoints:
      - host: 172.18.0.2          # 節點 A = worker-a(zone A 無線線);boot-stack 渲染當前 IP
        port: 9099
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          - 172.18.0.2/32         # boot-stack 渲染成 <worker-a IP>/32(收斂)
      - host: 172.18.0.4          # 節點 B = worker-b(zone B 基礎設施線);boot-stack 渲染當前 IP
        port: 9099
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          - 172.18.0.4/32         # boot-stack 渲染成 <worker-b IP>/32(不同占位避免 sed 撞)
    binaries:
      - { path: /usr/local/bin/hermes }
      - { path: /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/python }
      - { path: /usr/bin/python3* }
      - { path: /usr/bin/curl }
      - { path: /usr/bin/socat }
